name: Power Sentry
description: A battery-and-power watch that helps you read drain, charging, and energy mode at a glance.
short_description: A battery-and-power watch that helps you read drain, charging, and energy mode at a glance.
default_prompt: Use $power-sentry to build a polished macOS menu-bar utility for a battery-and-power watch that helps you read drain, charging, and energy mode at a glance.
audience: People who care about battery life
detail_lines: Shows battery state and energy mode without the noise of a diagnostics dump.
Pairs well with lightweight trend cues and significant energy usage.
Stays calm enough to live in the menu bar all day.
